description: Insert a double-free in target-b source (dynarray.c, bstree.c, or strmap.c) by appending an extra free() on a pointer whose deallocation already occurs in the function's normal exit path, simulating a missed-null-check double-free.

metadata.notes: Targets free() call sites in dynarray.c, bstree.c, and strmap.c — injects a duplicate free() after the original to produce a double-free condition.
